    Description
    CenterWindow
    This class manages to center a child window on a parent window.
    FileChooserFilter
    A generic File Filter for files, to use in FileChooser.
    FileChooserHelper
    A generic File Chooser Helper for files, to use in FileChooser.
    FileChooserPreview
    A generic File Chooser Preview for files, to use in FileChooser.
    FileChooserView
    A generic File View for files, to use in FileChooser.
    IconUtils
    Creates an Image Icon from a file or an Object.
